output.rationale: For a new business launch, traditional electional astrology emphasizes (1) a waxing Moon for growth energy, (2) Moon not void of course so the venture takes root, (3) Mercury direct so contracts and communication go through cleanly, (4) no Moon-Saturn affliction to avoid early delays and obstacles, and (5) Jupiter in a strong house (1, 4, 7, 10, 11) for expansion and visibility.
